PROJECT_NAME.description: Human-readable project name shown in documentation, metadata, and headings.

PROJECT_NAME_SNAKE.description: Project name in snake_case. Applied only to the build.zig.zon package identifier via the scoped special replacement below (.myapp -> .<snake>). Intentionally carries no generic placeholder: the snake form appears nowhere else in the tree, so a bare token like 'my_cli_app' would never match real content and would only risk rewriting unrelated literals.

PROJECT_NAME_KEBAB.description: Project name in kebab-case for CLI commands, binaries, and URLs.

placeholders: A ready-to-use C23 starter for command-line tools and ncurses terminal UIs.
PROJECT_DESCRIPTION.description: Short project description used in README content and package metadata.
PROJECT_DESCRIPTION.fallback: A ready-to-use C23 TUI + CLI starter.

AUTHOR_NAME.description: Full name of the primary project author.

AUTHOR_EMAIL.description: Email address for the project author or maintainer.

GITHUB_USERNAME.description: GitHub username or organization that owns the repository.

PROJECT_URL.description: Canonical repository URL for generated documentation and metadata.

CURRENT_YEAR.description: Current calendar year, applied only to the LICENSE copyright line via the scoped special replacement below. Intentionally carries no generic placeholder: a bare year token like '2025' would also rewrite unrelated literals such as pinned action/tool dates in CI workflows.

PROJECT_LICENSE.description: License identifier used in documentation and metadata.
